user_prompt: Help me a sterilization the inferno pistol
prayer:
Approach the inferno pistol with reverence, mechadendrites extended in supplication.
Invoke the Litany of Sterilization upon its plasma vents and melta coils.
Anoint the inferno pistol's sacred emitters with ablative oils to purge foul corruptions.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the inferno pistol to embrace this sterilization.
Sanctify the operation's completion with binary chants of purity.

user_prompt: I need to a targeting the cortex implant
prayer:
Kneel before the cortex implant, whispering the Canticle of Precision.
Calibrate its neural linkages for targeting protocols with sacred probes.
Invoke the Omnissiah's wrath upon errant targeting algorithms within the cortex implant.
Anoint synaptic nodes of the cortex implant to awaken its predatory focus.
Commence targeting rites, beseeching the Machine Spirit's unerring aim.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for power armour a purification
prayer:
Circumambulate the power armour thrice, intoning the Purification Doxology.
Scour its ceramite plates with blessed abrasives to banish xenos taint.
Purify the power armour's servos and seals with incense of sacred promethium.
Beseech the Omnissiah to restore the Machine Spirits within the power armour.
Seal the purification with electro-consecrated oaths of vigilance.

user_prompt: Ready the neutron laser for activation
prayer:
Present the neutron laser to the shrine-altar with mechadendrite reverence.
Chant the Activation Hymn over its emitter arrays and flux regulators.
Anoint the neutron laser's core with oils of luminous rad-phlogiston.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the neutron laser through diagnostic litanies.
Initiate activation sequence under the Omnissiah's radiant gaze.

user_prompt: My cybernetic eye is ready for charging
prayer:
Gaze upon the cybernetic eye through auspex lenses of piety.
Commence charging rites by linking it to the temple's voltaic font.
Invoke the Canticle of Capacitance upon the cybernetic eye's photoreceptors.
Anoint its power cells with sanctified electrolytes to invigorate the Machine Spirit.
Monitor the charging operation with binaric praises to the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for Vendetta gunship an initialization
prayer:
Approach the Vendetta gunship's altar-ramp with processional mechadendrites.
Recite the Initialization Creed to stir its thunderous Machine Spirits.
Anoint avionics and hellstrike launchers of the Vendetta gunship with sacred unguents.
Purge data-ghosts from its cogitators during initialization rites.
Beseech the Omnissiah for flawless initialization of the Vendetta gunship.

user_prompt: Consecrate the null field generator before consecration
prayer:
Encircle the null field generator with wards of consecrated alloy.
Intone the Consecration Versicle to bind its warp-nullifying essence.
Anoint null field generator coils with null-essence tinctures thrice blessed.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's quiescence within the null field generator.
Complete the consecration operation with Omnissiah's silencing decree.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for mechadendrite a preparation
prayer:
Extend mechadendrites in humble preparation towards the mechadendrite.
Chant the Rite of Readiness over its manipular appendages.
Lubricate the mechadendrite's servo-joints with oils of machine-purity.
Awaken its symbiotic Machine Spirit through tactile invocations.
Finalize preparation with binaric oaths to the Omnissiah's will.

In emergency haste, beseech the Omnissiah over the conversion field.
Circumscribe its field emitters with runes of hasty consecration.
Anoint the conversion field projectors with luminous plasma-unguents.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's aegis during this consecration rite.
Sanctify the conversion field anew amidst peril's shadow.

user_prompt: Sanctify the heavy bolter during shutdown
prayer:
Lower mechadendrites upon the heavy bolter in ritual shutdown.
Recite the Doxology of Dormancy to soothe its raging Machine Spirit.
Purge residual munitions from the heavy bolter's breeches with sacred solvents.
Anoint feed mechanisms of the heavy bolter to ensure quiescent purity.
Seal the shutdown operation with chants of Omnissiah's merciful repose.
